input_text: Dah la rumah baru beli, air takde tekanan. Tingkat atas memang kering. Developer cakap masalah sementara tapi dah 6 bulan.
reason: Low water pressure in new home for 6 months despite developer promising temporary issue.
suggested_rewrite: Tekanan air yang rendah selama 6 bulan bukan masalah sementara. Laporkan kepada SPAN dan failkan tuntutan di Tribunal Pembeli Rumah.

input_text: This clinic prescribes antibiotics for everything. Common cold also give antibiotics. Over-prescription is dangerous.
reason: Over-prescription of antibiotics for minor ailments, public health concern.
suggested_rewrite: Antibiotic overuse contributes to resistance. Patients can politely ask doctors if antibiotics are truly necessary for their condition.

input_text: 公司总是在发工资前的一天才通知加班。根本不考虑员工的个人安排。
reason: Company giving last-minute overtime notice ignoring employee personal schedules.
suggested_rewrite: 雇主应提前通知加班安排以尊重员工的个人时间。紧急情况除外，加班应有合理的提前通知。

input_text: Nak guna pusat komuniti untuk aktiviti belia pun kena bayar sewa. Padahal bangunan tu buat guna duit rakyat.
reason: Community center charging rent for youth activities despite being publicly funded.
suggested_rewrite: Pusat komuniti yang dibina dengan dana awam perlu menyediakan waktu penggunaan percuma untuk aktiviti belia. Cadangan boleh dikemukakan kepada PBT.

input_text: Masjid punya parking selalu penuh masa Jumaat. Tapi jiran complain kalau parking kat tepi jalan. Both sides frustrated.
reason: Friday prayer parking overflow causing neighborhood friction.
suggested_rewrite: Masjid dan jiran boleh bekerjasama mencari penyelesaian seperti shuttle dari kawasan parking jauh atau pembinaan parking tambahan.

input_text: Children's clinic in my area closed down. Nearest one is 30 minutes away. Rural healthcare getting worse not better.
reason: Closure of local children's clinic forcing 30-min trip, rural healthcare decline.
suggested_rewrite: Rural healthcare closures need alternatives like mobile clinics or telehealth services. Report service gaps to the state health department.

input_text: 每次去市场买鱼都被骗秤。老板手按在秤上。一公斤只有八百克。
reason: Market vendor cheating on scales by pressing down during weighing.
suggested_rewrite: 消费者可以要求重新称重。如发现商贩作弊，向KPDNHEP举报并带上证据。

input_text: Nak buat pasport untuk anak kecil pun kena pergi sendiri ke pejabat. Apahal tak boleh buat online? Susahkan parent yang kerja.
reason: Child passport requiring in-person visit inconveniencing working parents.
suggested_rewrite: Proses permohonan pasport kanak-kanak boleh dipermodenkan dengan langkah-langkah dalam talian. Slot temujanji hujung minggu juga akan membantu ibu bapa yang bekerja.

input_text: Apartment bbq area always dirty. Previous users never clean up. Management doesn't enforce rules. Facilities wasted.
reason: Condo BBQ area always left dirty with no enforcement of cleanup rules.
suggested_rewrite: BBQ area usage should include a mandatory cleanup policy with deposits. Management should conduct post-use inspections.

input_text: Kenapa gaji minimum kat Sabah dan Sarawak lebih rendah dari Semenanjung? Kos hidup kat sana pun tinggi jugak.
reason: Lower minimum wage in Sabah/Sarawak despite comparable cost of living.
suggested_rewrite: Perbezaan gaji minimum antara negeri perlu dikaji semula berdasarkan kos sara hidup sebenar. Pelarasan berkala penting untuk keadilan.

input_text: Bus Rapidku ni selalu rosak aircond. Dalam cuaca Malaysia yang panas, naik bas macam masuk sauna.
reason: Bus air-conditioning frequently broken in hot Malaysian climate.
suggested_rewrite: Penyelenggaraan aircond bas perlu dijadualkan secara berkala. Aduan boleh dibuat melalui aplikasi Prasarana.

input_text: இந்த பகுதியில் எந்த வங்கியும் இல்லை. அருகிலுள்ள வங்கி 15 கிலோமீட்டர் தொலைவில் உள்ளது.
reason: No bank in the area, nearest one 15km away limiting financial access.
suggested_rewrite: வங்கி சேவைகள் அனைத்து பகுதிகளிலும் அணுகக்கூடியதாக இருக்க வேண்டும். நடமாடும் வங்கி சேவைகள் அல்லது முகவர் வங்கி இதற்கு தீர்வாக அமையலாம்.

input_text: Nak bayar compound online tapi system suruh pergi kaunter. Pergi kaunter pulak suruh bayar online. Makan ular.
reason: Circular referral between online and counter for compound payment, runaround.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah sistem pembayaran yang bercanggah perlu dilaporkan kepada jabatan berkaitan supaya proses diperbaiki. Minta nombor rujukan setiap aduan.

input_text: My elderly mother fell at the wet market because there's no proper drainage. Floor always slippery. Nobody accountable.
reason: Elderly person falling at wet market due to slippery undrained floors, safety hazard.
suggested_rewrite: Wet markets need proper drainage and anti-slip flooring. Document the incident and report to the market management and local council for safety improvements.

input_text: Dah hantar 3 kali surat kepada MP tentang jalan berlubang. Takde satu pun jawapan. Demokrasi representative konon.
reason: Three unanswered letters to MP about potholes, questioning representative democracy.
suggested_rewrite: Jika MP tidak responsif, eskalasi kepada pejabat ADUN atau gunakan saluran aduan rasmi kepada JKR terus.

input_text: 每天早上堵车两个小时到公司。下班又堵两个小时。一天四个小时在路上。这不是生活。
reason: Four hours daily commuting destroying quality of life.
suggested_rewrite: 长时间通勤问题需要综合解决方案：灵活工作制度、远程办公选择和更好的公共交通连接。

input_text: Kalau bawa anak sakit pergi klinik kerajaan malam, cuma ada MO. Specialist takde. Baik pergi swasta tapi mahal.
reason: No specialists at government clinics after hours for sick children, forced to expensive private.
suggested_rewrite: Perkhidmatan pakar selepas waktu pejabat di hospital kerajaan perlu ditambah. Talian nasihat kesihatan 24 jam juga boleh membantu ibu bapa membuat keputusan.

input_text: The new MRT station is already showing cracks on the platform. Built just last year. Contractor standards are terrible.
reason: New MRT station platform cracking after one year, construction quality concern.
suggested_rewrite: Structural cracks in new infrastructure should be reported and investigated urgently. The contractor should be held accountable under defect liability provisions.

input_text: Nak guna tandas kat stesen LRT tapi selalu tutup untuk maintenance. Penumpang terpaksa tahan. Macam mana commute 1 jam?
reason: LRT station toilets frequently closed for maintenance during operating hours.
suggested_rewrite: Penyelenggaraan tandas stesen perlu dijadualkan di luar waktu puncak. Stesen yang sibuk perlu tandas alternatif semasa penyelenggaraan.

input_text: 医院的停车费比商场还贵。病人来看病还要承受高额停车费。这合理吗？
reason: Hospital parking more expensive than mall, adding financial burden to patients.
suggested_rewrite: 医院停车费应考虑患者的经济负担。可以为有预约的患者提供优惠停车票。

input_text: Tukang cat rumah minta bayaran penuh dulu baru start kerja. Lepas bayar, kerja separuh jalan lepas tu hilang.
reason: House painter demanding full upfront payment then abandoning half-done job.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan bayar penuh di muka untuk sebarang kerja kontrak. Bayar mengikut peringkat siap kerja dan pastikan perjanjian bertulis.

input_text: Nak complain bunyi bising construction site kena isi borang 3 helai. Orang biasa tak ada masa nak buat semua tu.
reason: 3-page form to complain about construction noise, bureaucratic barrier.
suggested_rewrite: Proses aduan bunyi bising perlu dipermudahkan. Talian aduan telefon atau WhatsApp boleh memudahkan orang ramai membuat aduan tanpa borang rumit.

input_text: Fresh grad dapat gaji RM2500 tapi sewa bilik RM800, loan kereta RM600, PTPTN RM400. Baki tinggal RM700 untuk makan sebulan.
reason: Detailed breakdown showing fresh graduate barely surviving on RM2500 salary.
suggested_rewrite: Cabaran kewangan graduan baru perlu perhatian serius. Program latihan kewangan dan penyesuaian gaji permulaan mengikut kos sara hidup diperlukan.

input_text: Disabled parking always taken by non-disabled drivers. Blue badge required but no one checks. Shameful behavior.
reason: Non-disabled drivers taking disabled parking with no enforcement of blue badge.
suggested_rewrite: OKU parking enforcement should be taken seriously. Report misuse to the local council and advocate for proper monitoring systems.
